sglang.title: [BugFix] add verify logit_bias to avoid crash because of IndexError
sglang.author: ehuaa
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
fix this issue #7670.
Modifications
Add check of logit_bias in verify to avoid IndexError in #7670, which may cause server crash.
Ensure the keys in logit_bias is in [0, vocab_size - 1]

sglang.author: lifuhuang

Motivation
The current implementation of the dynamic LoRA update has several major limitations, most notably:

Issue 1 [Known limitation] (#7463 ). User must provide at least one initial --lora-paths, and
Issue 2 [Bug]  (#7808 ). the initial adapter shapes (target modules, lora_rank) must be either
